presets.name: German Payslip
presets.description: German Lohn-/Gehaltsabrechnung. Detects Steuerident-Nr., Rentenversicherungs-Nr., Krankenversicherungs-Nr., IBAN, German dates and phone numbers, plus names, addresses. Disables the noisy 'Amounts' detector.

presets.name: Italian Busta Paga
presets.description: Italian payslip. Detects Codice Fiscale, Partita IVA, Matricola INPS, IBAN, Italian dates and phone numbers, plus names, addresses. Disables the noisy 'Amounts' detector so salary figures aren't over-redacted.

presets.name: US W-2 / Pay Stub
presets.description: US tax forms and pay stubs (W-2, W-4, 1099, generic paystubs). Detects SSN, EIN, US dates, US ZIP codes, US phone numbers, bank routing numbers (context-anchored), plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts.

presets.name: Generic Invoice
presets.description: Generic invoice or receipt. Detects invoice numbers, dates, EU VAT IDs, IBAN, BIC/SWIFT (context-anchored), international phones, plus names, addresses, emails. Amounts kept visible — toggle Amounts manually to hide totals too.

presets.name: Bank Statement
presets.description: Bank or credit card statement. Detects IBAN, BIC/SWIFT (context-anchored), masked card numbers, full card numbers (13-19 digits), transaction references, dates, international phones, plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts.

presets.name: US Common Surnames
presets.description: Opt-in preset that hides the top 10,000 most common US surnames (US Census 2010, ~68% population coverage). Useful for redacting guest lists, reservation calendars, employee rosters, and any document that's essentially a column of names. Some false positives expected on common-word surnames (Brown, Green, Stone) — that's the tradeoff for opt-in coverage.
